theme: one-stroke kolam curve around a dot grid
title: Kolam Mandala: One Stroke Against Symmetry
strategies: trivial: blindly merge the loop system into one stroke (weight- and orbit-blind first bridge)
greedy: break symmetry at the cheapest tiles by weight, ignoring the orbit-clustering interaction
strong: minimum-cost symmetry-breaking that also spreads breaks across C4 orbits to dodge the interaction penalty
